name: Cybersecurity
description: An in-depth guide to protecting systems, networks, and data from digital threats.

subtopics.name: 1. Cybersecurity Foundations
subtopics.description: Start here to learn the basic principles and terminology of cybersecurity.

subtopics.name: 2. Network Security
subtopics.description: Discover how to secure network infrastructure from unauthorized access and threats.

subtopics.name: 3. Application & Software Security
subtopics.description: Learn to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities in software and applications.

subtopics.name: 4. Cryptography
subtopics.description: Explore the science of secure communication and data protection.

subtopics.name: 5. Identity & Access Management
subtopics.description: Understand how to manage and control user access to critical systems and data.

subtopics.name: 6. Threats, Attacks, and Vulnerabilities
subtopics.description: An overview of common cyber threats and attack vectors.

subtopics.name: 7. Security Operations (SecOps)
subtopics.description: Learn about the tools and processes for monitoring and responding to security incidents.

subtopics.name: 8. Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC)
subtopics.description: Understand the frameworks and regulations that govern cybersecurity practices.

subtopics.name: 9. Advanced & Specialized Topics
subtopics.description: Dive into specialized areas like cloud security, IoT, and industrial control systems.

body.raw: Understand the principles and practices of cybersecurity. This section covers cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, and threat modeling to protect digital assets.
body.html: Understand the principles and practices of cybersecurity. This section covers cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, and threat modeling to protect digital assets.
